texts.desc: When your opponent activates the effect of a monster on the field that was not Summoned this turn: Negate the activation, then you can banish (face-down) all face-up monsters your opponent controls that were not Summoned this turn. If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Set 1 Trap from your Deck.
texts.name: Annihilating Retrolight
